name: villagers
identity: A group of locals who initially captured the player character but have now shifted to a neutral or cooperative stance, gathering to witness a ritualistic healing process.
current_status: Rippling with a collective sigh of relief as the player is freed from icy vines; one former captor is actively removing the net, while a younger woman offers the player a steaming broth.

volatile_state.current_activity: witnessing the player's healing ritual and assisting in removing the binding vines

notes: The faction's attitude has shifted from hostile captors to cooperative observers/participants in the elder's ritual.
